summary.key_theme: 市場對私人信貸穩定性的擔憂以及對紐約市債務前景的負面展望，抵銷了公司長期股息成長的正面價值。

bullish.title: You Won't Believe How Much Money Berkshire Hathaway Gets From Moody's Dividends — As the dividend grows, your yield over time grows, too.
bullish.reason: 強調 Moody's 作為長期股息成長股的價值，吸引價值型投資人，並透過 Berkshire Hathaway 的持股背書增加市場信心。

bearish.title: Moody's, Piper Sandler, StepStone Group, Hamilton Lane, and Capital One Shares Plummet, What You Need To Know — A number of stocks fell in the afternoon session after investors raised concerns over the stability of the private credit
bearish.reason: 市場對私人信貸市場的穩定性產生廣泛疑慮，導致金融服務類股集體下跌，直接衝擊 MCO 的短期股價表現。

bearish.title: Moody's Cuts New York City Outlook to Negative as Budget Gaps Grow — Ratings firm keeps Aa2 debt rating but warns persistent deficits and rising expenses may pressure the city's financial f
bearish.reason: Moody's 將紐約市債務展望下調至負面，反映出其對市政債務風險的嚴格審查，雖維持 Aa2 評級，但市場擔憂此舉可能引發連鎖反應。

bearish.title: Rise of structured private credit transactions adds challenges for risk analysis – Moody's — Moody’s Ratings warns that the rapid spread of structured private credit transactions among investment‑grade companies i
bearish.reason: Moody's 自身指出結構化私人信貸交易增加風險分析難度，顯示該公司在評估新興金融產品時面臨更大的技術與監管挑戰。

neutral.title: Moody's Corporation (MCO) Presents at BofA Securities 2026 Information & Business Services Conference Transcript
neutral.reason: 公司於 BofA 會議中進行簡報，屬於常規投資人溝通，未釋出重大超預期訊息，對股價影響有限。

neutral.title: Moody's (MCO) Valuation Check After Recent Share Price Weakness
neutral.reason: 針對股價近期疲軟進行技術性回顧，並無具體基本面利空或利多消息，僅為市場情緒的觀察報告。

neutral.title: Could Moody's (MCO) Tighter Credit Scrutiny Subtly Reshape Its Own Risk-Reward Narrative?
neutral.reason: 探討 Moody's 嚴格的信用審查對其自身風險回報模型的影響，屬於分析師觀點，而非實質營運變動。
